raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/XXXX I purchased artwork from Wayfair for {$170.00} using my Wayfair Mastercard / CBNA Account # XXXX XX/XX/XXXX I paid {$170.00} through my bank 's " bill pay '' module. Wayfair recorded it to an old Wayfair Account # XXXX. I am unable to pull up that account for backup ; however, I have 2 attachments from my bank documenting this. 
XX/XX/XXXX Wayfair refunded the {$170.00} to my bank account. 
XX/XX/XXXX I made a second payment of {$170.00} through my bank 's " bill pay '' module specifically to the new Account # XXXX This is the payment my bank subtracted from my account on XX/XX/XXXX and Wayfair " could never find '' or they applied it to the wrong account or they just lost it. I spoke with them and mailed backup to them at several different addresses about twice weekly. My backup for this is almost an inch thick! 
For example, I mailed one letter certified return receipt. I received it back saying they were temporarily not accepting mail at this time! 
XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX  reported me 2 months delinquent on my credit report reducing my score over XXXX points to XXXX. I take my credit score very seriously, at one time this year having it at XXXX. 
More home calls, more letters. I got XXXX involved, but, even with proper backup documentation they couldn't change my report- Per my phone calls, CBNA certifies their information was correct. CBNA apologized twice and said they would contact XXXX to correct this, but after weeks, I have heard nothing. 
XX/XX/XXXX I finally decided their help was useless and had my bank stop payment on the check and I mailed a payment for the THIRD TIME- check # XXXX  for {$170.00} and it was finally cashed on XXXX XXXX. 
XXXX, XX/XX/XXXX, and XX/XX/XXXX Among the personnel in management that now promised to fix my credit report were : XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX in Idaho, and XX/XX/XXXXXXXX XXXX in Idaho. Still no fix. 
Present I need someone to fix my credit report to show I paid on time. THREE TIMES! 
Please, please contact me if you need any addditional information.
